debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ C, ∃ (_ : Convex ℝ C), ∃ x y, ∀ (i : ℕ) (s : Set ℕ), x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s

failed_attempts:

  · sorry

  let z (s : Set ℕ) (i : ℕ) : Fin 3 → ℝ := ![i, i ^ 2, if i ∈ s then 0 else 1]
